---
title: "GSM - AE Distribution Report"
subtitle: "Generated with the Good Statistical Monitoring {gsm} package"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: scroll
    css: styles.css
params:
  snapshot: NA
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(gsm)
library(DT)
library(gt)
library(dplyr)
library(plotly)
library(glue)
library(htmltools)
devtools::load_all()
```

```{r}
## Create data --------------------------------------------------------
study_comp <- Covariate_Map(dfCovariate = params$snapshot$lStudyAssessResults$kri0006$lData$dfSTUDCOMP,
              strCovariateColName = "compreas", 
              strWorkflowId = "kri0006"
              )
 
treat_comp <- Covariate_Map(dfCovariate = params$snapshot$lStudyAssessResults$kri0007$lData$dfSDRGCOMP,
              strCovariateColName = "sdrgreas", 
              strWorkflowId = "kri0007"
              )

study_comp_charts <- Covariate_Charts(study_comp)

treat_comp_charts <- Covariate_Charts(treat_comp)
```

Study Discontinuation
================================================================

Sidebar {.sidebar}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
# Study
h4(strong("Study:"))
cat(unique(study_comp$kri0006$study$`Study ID`))

# Snapshot
h4(strong("Snapshot:"))
cat(as.character(params$snapshot$lSnapshotDate))

```

Scatter Plot {.tabset .tabset-fade}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
tab_title("Study-wide Discontinuation Reasons")
```

### <font size=3px>**Scatter Plot**</font> 
```{r}
params$snapshot$lCharts$kri0006$scatterJS
```

### <font size=3px>**Bar Plot (Metric)**</font> 
```{r}
params$snapshot$lCharts$kri0006$barMetricJS
```

### <font size=3px>**Bar Plot (Score)**</font> 
```{r}
params$snapshot$lCharts$kri0006$barScoreJS
```

Bar Plot Study {.tabset .tabset-fade}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
tab_title("Study-wide Discontinuation Reasons")
```

```{r}
fig_bar_study <- round(length(unique(study_comp$kri0006$study$Metric))/3)
fig_bar_site <- round(length(unique(study_comp$kri0006$site$`Site ID`))/3)
```

### <font size=3px>**Number**</font> 
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_study} }
study_comp_charts$kri0006$study
```

### <font size=3px>**Percent**</font>
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_study} }
plot_ly(study_comp$kri0006$study) %>%
  add_trace(
    y = ~reorder(Metric, Percent),
    x = ~Percent,
    type = "bar",
    orientation = "h",
    text = paste0(
      glue("Percent of Total: {study_comp$kri0006$study$`%`}"), "</br></br>",
      glue("Reason: {study_comp$kri0006$study$Metric}")
    ),
    textposition = "none",
    hoverinfo = "text") %>%
  layout(yaxis = list(title = ""),
         xaxis = list(title = list(text = "<b>Distribution of Discontinuation Reasons</b>"),
                      titlefont = list(size = 16)),
         margin = list(pad = 4)
  )
```

Bar Plot Site {.tabset .tabset-fade}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
tab_title("Site-wide Discontinuation Reasons")
```

### <font size=3px>**Number**</font>
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_site} }
study_comp_charts$kri0006$site
```

### <font size=3px>**Percent**</font>
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_site} }
plot_ly(study_comp$kri0006$site) %>%
  add_trace(
    y = ~reorder(`Site ID`, `Total Site`),
    x = ~Percent,
    color = ~Metric,
    type = "bar",
    # orientation = "h",
    text = paste0(
      glue("Site: {treat_comp$kri0007$site$`Site ID`}"), "</br></br>",
      glue("Patient Count: {treat_comp$kri0007$site$`Total Metric`}"), "</br>",
      glue("Metric: {treat_comp$kri0007$site$Metric}")
    ),
    textposition = "none",
    hoverinfo = "text"
  ) %>%
  layout(xaxis = list(title = "<b>Percentage of Discontinuation Reasons</b>"),
         yaxis = list(title = list(text = ""),
                      titlefont = list(size = 16)),
         barmode = "stack",
         margin = list(pad = 4))
```

Treatment Discontinuation
================================================================

Sidebar {.sidebar}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
# Study
h4(strong("Study:"))
cat(unique(treat_comp$kri0007$study$`Study ID`))

# Snapshot
h4(strong("Snapshot:"))
cat(as.character(params$snapshot$lSnapshotDate))

```

Scatter Plot {.tabset .tabset-fade}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
tab_title("Treatment Discontinuation Rate by Site")
```

### <font size=3px>**Scatter Plot**</font> 
```{r}
params$snapshot$lCharts$kri0007$scatterJS
```

### <font size=3px>**Bar Plot (Metric)**</font> 
```{r}
params$snapshot$lCharts$kri0007$barMetricJS
```

### <font size=3px>**Bar Plot (Score)**</font> 
```{r}
params$snapshot$lCharts$kri0007$barScoreJS
```

Bar Plot Study {.tabset .tabset-fade}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
tab_title("Study-wide Discontinuation Reasons")
```

```{r}
fig_bar_study <- round(length(unique(treat_comp$kri0007$study$Metric))/3)
fig_bar_site <- round(length(unique(treat_comp$kri0007$site$`Site ID`))/3)
```

### <font size=3px>**Number**</font>
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_study} }
treat_comp_charts$kri0007$study
```

### <font size=3px>**Percent**</font>
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_study} }
plot_ly(treat_comp$kri0007$study) %>%
  add_trace(
    y = ~reorder(Metric, Percent),
    x = ~Percent,
    type = "bar",
    orientation = "h",
    text = paste0(
      glue("Percent of Total: {treat_comp$kri0007$study$`%`}"), "</br></br>",
      glue("Reason: {treat_comp$kri0007$study$Metric}")
    ),
    textposition = "none",
    hoverinfo = "text") %>%
  layout(yaxis = list(title = ""),
         xaxis = list(title = list(text = "<b>Distribution of Discontinuation Reasons</b>"),
                      titlefont = list(size = 16)),
         margin = list(pad = 4)
  )
```

Bar Plot Site {.tabset .tabset-fade}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
tab_title("Site-wide Discontinuation Reasons")
```

### <font size=3px>**Number**</font>
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_site} }
treat_comp_charts$kri0007$site
```

### <font size=3px>**Percent**</font>
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_site} }
plot_ly(treat_comp$kri0007$site) %>%
  add_trace(
    y = ~reorder(`Site ID`, `Total Site`),
    x = ~Percent,
    color = ~Metric,
    type = "bar",
    # orientation = "h",
    text = paste0(
      glue("Site: {treat_comp$kri0007$site$`Site ID`}"), "</br></br>",
      glue("Patient Count: {treat_comp$kri0007$site$`Total Metric`}"), "</br>",
      glue("Metric: {treat_comp$kri0007$site$Metric}")
    ),
    textposition = "none",
    hoverinfo = "text"
  ) %>%
  layout(xaxis = list(title = "<b>Number of Patients</b>"),
         yaxis = list(title = list(text = ""),
                      titlefont = list(size = 16)),
         barmode = "stack",
         margin = list(pad = 4))
```
